summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QR code generation feature post garment analysis. All core QR code functionality is working correctly including QR code display, share page functionality, and certificate generation.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard write permission denied error appears in development overlay
ui_bugs.details: Copy functionality works but shows runtime error overlay due to clipboard permissions in test environment

passed_tests: QR code is displayed after analysis on results page
Share page /share/:analysisId loads correctly with proper URL routing
Share page shows RVS score with circular gauge visualization
Share page displays action badge with correct styling
Share page shows complete analysis details (fabric type, condition, brand, AI confidence)
Copy link button is present and functional
View Page button is present and opens share page
Share page displays 'Garment Reusability Certificate' header
Share page has no navigation bar (correctly hidden)
Score breakdown is visible on share page with RVS formula
QR code includes Mud Patch logo integration
Share URL format is correct with analysis ID
Analysis history displays properly with RVS gauges and action badges
Return credit display works when retail price is provided
Issues detected section shows damage and stain information when present
Analysis date and certificate footer are displayed
Analyze Your Garment button redirects to home page correctly
